texto: I would say the film world has stopped operating as one. We have divided it into Hindi movies, Bengali movies, Tamil movies and so on. Earlier, there was only one channel and we all knew what was going on. Today, it is hard to keep track of programmes due to the advent of regional channels.
explicacao: Citação de Mithun Chakraborty sobre temas ligados a tempo. “I would say the film world has stopped operating as one. We have divided it into Hindi movies, Be…” articula tempo, today, world em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como world e divided.

frase_original: I would say the film world has stopped operating as one. We have divided it into Hindi movies, Bengali movies, Tamil movies and so on. Earlier, there was only one channel and we all knew what was going on. Today, it is hard to keep track of programmes due to the advent of regional channels.
